stoppingPoint: Stop after policy review and metadata warning. Do not continue into compile-aware validation or gate migration in this sprint.

recommendedNextSprint.objective: Decide whether to migrate screen_shader from normal writable path treatment into a display/render watchdog gate, or propose explicit block/removal with user approval.
mustNotDo: do not run live shader compile
do not use active render state

laterOptionalSprint.precondition: Only after display/render high-risk gate policy is decided.
laterOptionalSprint.allowedDirection: standalone/temp shader fixture validation only if a non-live compiler path is proven safe
